description: Multi-Layered that provides cushioning and protection for the heel. It’s perfect to pair with your running, cross trainer, casual, dress and work shoes for diminishing pain related to over-pronation (mild to moderate), plantar fasciitis/heel pain, foot, arch & heel pain, calluses, hammertoes & claw toe, bunions, neuromas, ankle & knee pain. Provides outstanding balance between firm yet flexible Support with a deeper heel cup to provide better control and fit.
features: Podiatrist designed & APMA accepted to promote quality foothealth.
Alleviates pain associated with plantar fasciitis arch pain& heel spurs amongst other foot conditions.
Supports & protects the arch, foot, ankle, knee, &lower back.
parentTitle: PowerStep ProTech Control Orthotic Insoles - Medical Grade Arch Support Inserts for Plantar Fasciitis Relief- Made in USA - Maximum Cushioning + ShockAbsorb Orthotic,
safetyWarning: Consult a healthcare professional before use. These orthotics are designed to correct overpronation and provide support for specific foot conditions. They may not be suitable for everyone. Follow the instructions for proper sizing and usage to avoid discomfort or injury.
title: PowerStep ProTech Control Orthotic Insoles - Medical Grade Arch Support Inserts for Plantar Fasciitis Relief- Made in USA - Maximum Cushioning + ShockAbsorb Orthotic (M 11-11.5)
